---
title: "Labs"
---

This section collects worksheet-style pages for hands-on design practice.

## Matching Labs

The matching labs were migrated from `../matching-trg` and adapted to fit this repo's section structure.

- [LaLonde Matching Lab](lalonde-matching-lab.qmd)
- [Black Politicians Lab](black-politicians-lab.qmd)
- [NSW and CPS Benchmark Lab](nsw-cps-benchmark-lab.qmd)
- [HISP IE Practice Lab](hisp-ie-practice-lab.qmd)

## Synthetic Control Design Labs

These are draft lab skeletons for synthetic-control work:

- [Synthetic Control Design Lab](synthetic-control-design-lab.qmd)
- [Synthetic Control Donor Pool Lab](synthetic-control-donor-pool-lab.qmd)

## Working Rule

Keep the same standard across all labs: define the design before estimating, document the tradeoffs introduced by the design, and state clearly what the resulting comparison can and cannot support.
